entities.name: DIGITAL SOIL MAPPING
entities.description: The process of using digital tools and data to map soil properties.

entities.name: REMOTE SENSING IMAGES
entities.description: Images captured by sensors to analyze soil properties from a distance.

entities.name: SOIL PREDICTION MODELS
entities.description: Models used to predict soil properties based on various data inputs.

entities.name: SOUTHERN INDIA
entities.description: The geographical region where the study was conducted.

entities.name: KOTHAPALLY
entities.description: A smallholder farm located in Telangana State, Southern India.

entities.name: MASUTI
entities.description: A smallholder farm located in Karnataka State, Southern India.

entities.name: BAYESIAN KRIGING
entities.description: A geostatistical interpolation method used to characterize spatial patterns.

entities.name: EXCHANGEABLE POTASSIUM
entities.description: A soil nutrient property (Kex) analyzed in the topsoil.

entities.name: TOPSOIL
entities.description: The upper layer of soil, specifically 0-15 cm in this study.

entities.name: LANDSAT 8
entities.description: A remote sensing image source with a spatial resolution of 30 m.

entities.name: RAPIDEYE
entities.description: A remote sensing image source with a spatial resolution of 5 m.

entities.name: WORLDVIEW-2/GEOEYE-1/PLEIADES-1A
entities.description: Remote sensing image sources with a spatial resolution of 2 m.

entities.name: SPECTRAL INDICES
entities.description: Mathematical combinations of spectral bands used to identify soil properties.

entities.name: BAND REFLECTANCES
entities.description: The amount of light reflected by the soil surface at specific bands.

entities.name: BAND RATIOS
entities.description: The ratio of reflectances between two different spectral bands.

entities.name: CRUST INDEX
entities.description: A specific spectral index used to correlate with soil potassium.

entities.name: ATMOSPHERICALLY RESISTANT VEGETATION INDEX
entities.description: A specific spectral index used to correlate with soil potassium.

entities.name: SPATIAL RESOLUTION
entities.description: The size of the smallest pixel in a remote sensing image, affecting prediction performance.

entities.name: SOIL NUTRIENT MANAGEMENT SCHEME
entities.description: A field-specific approach to managing soil nutrients for sustainable farming.
